criteria.name: Functionality
criteria.description: The range of features and capabilities offered by the app, such as music generation, editing tools, and customization options.
criteria.sources: Product websites, user reviews, and feature lists.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: The ease of use, interface design, and overall user satisfaction with the app.
criteria.sources: User reviews, app store ratings, and usability studies.

criteria.name: Innovation
criteria.description: The uniqueness and advancement of the app's AI technology in music creation.
criteria.sources: Product descriptions, press releases, and industry analyses.

criteria.name: Accessibility
criteria.description: The availability of the app across different platforms and its affordability.
criteria.sources: App store listings, pricing information, and platform compatibility details.

criteria.name: Popularity
criteria.description: The app's user base size, download numbers, and presence in the market.
criteria.sources: App store statistics, user reviews, and market reports.
